extraction.one_line_summary: TRENTIN Matteo won a nervous sprint finish at Tarragona after Quick-Step positioned him through technical final kilometers.
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step's stage finish reconnaissance pre-race directly translated to positioning victories on tricky technical finales.
Breakaway groups dissolving on climbs before finals indicates peloton deliberately controlled tempo to preserve sprint.
Pre-3km crash positioning crucial: POZZOVIVO lost 3+ minutes overall while others neutralized under rule.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: Converted Quick-Step's technical finale positioning into convincing sprint victory at 60kph
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: positive: Successfully led out TRENTIN after taking own stage win earlier, showing domestique versatility
rider_signals.LOBATO Juan José: neutral: Beaten by TRENTIN on left side positioning despite being near front in finale
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: Pre-3km crash cost 3+ minutes GC, catastrophic positioning error for climber on flat stage
rider_signals.MORENO Daniel: negative: Crashed in nervous finale before 3km line, revealing pack positioning vulnerability
